design_philosophy: Warm, inclusive, and trustworthy. The design should feel natural, reflecting both pet care and agriculture with earthy tones, generous spacing, and soft edges. Avoid clinical or tech-heavy aesthetics.

typography.pairing_rules: Headlines use Cabinet Grotesk with tight tracking. Body text uses Manrope with relaxed line height. Overlines should be uppercase, small, and widely spaced.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid style for services. Use wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Leave negative space. Never center everything.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons.

surfaces_and_shadows.cards: Flat background (surface_muted or surface), 1px subtle border (#D1D8CE). Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-primary/30.
surfaces_and_shadows.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-[#F7F4EB]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#1A291E]/5 shadow-sm. Z-index 50.
surfaces_and_shadows.whatsapp_button: Fixed bottom-right, z-50, shadow-2xl, pulse animation on hover.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements must change background and text color on hover.

components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent_hover. Secondary: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white. Always rounded-full px-8 py-3.
components.forms: Use Shadcn customized. Soft borders, bg-surface focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent.
components.reviews_carousel: Card-based, horizontal scroll or bento grid. Include star icons.

icons.usage: Use warm, rounded icons (e.g. PawPrint, Leaf, Star, Heart, MapPin).

business_info.name: Mk Agropecuária e Pet Shop

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a multi-page marketing site architecture (either React Router or scrollable single-page with clear section IDs acting as pages).
Ensure all copy is in Portuguese (Brazilian).
Use Tailwind CSS for styling, adhering strictly to the color hex codes provided.
Implement the floating WhatsApp button using the brand's phone number.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs).
Use purely Shadcn UI for forms, customizing to remove default generic aesthetics (no Inter font, no default gray borders).
In the 'Sobre' (About) section, explicitly highlight that it's an LGBTQ+ friendly and women-led business using warm, welcoming storytelling.
Display the Google 4.8-star rating prominently in the Hero and Testimonial sections.
